ab: Haip qai isia pasnanava’an paintataiv tu qani’anan, papia ka inhamu’un tu paintataiv.
ch: 今天是學校的運動會，學校舉辦了許多競賽。
en: Today was the school's sports day, and the school organized many competitions.

ab: Haiza pasibutbut, kantundaq mali, tindangkul, uluzi siin manaq busul-kavi.
ch: 有拔河、足球、跑步、跳舞和射箭。
en: There were tug of war, soccer, running, dancing, and archery.
I participated in the running competition.

ab: Maaq tu tindangkul azak a, tiskapat azak, madia ihaan buqtung tu qaidang mutaul.
ch: 當我跑步的時候，我跌倒了，膝蓋流了很多血。
en: When I was running, I fell down, and my knees were bleeding.

ab: Qaitu mindangkaz azak, maldauk masaupa tanangaus tindangkul.
ch: 但我站起來，繼續向前跑。
en: But I stood up and continued running forward.

ab: Maaq tu tunahaan azak panatpu’an qai, manahip amin a sikaupa tu bunun.
ch: 我到終點時，所有人都很開心。
en: Everyone was happy when I reached the finish line.

ab: Anatupa tu nii azak makitngangaus tindangkul, qaitu manahip azak, maupa’i pankanaqtungin azak paintataiv.
ch: 雖然沒有獲得第一名，但我很高興，因為我完成了比賽。
en: Although I didn't get first place, I'm glad because I completed the race.
